TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: atipal (kamu nu Hulam:ÁôĹť†≠ÁŅĀ) sakanamuhan a tengilan ku suni nu atipal. nikudan nu tangila' idaw ku sanglacay a kulita, nina masulitay atu sanglacay a kulit a lumeni', mala sanglacay nu lalielan. sanglacay a tangah katinengan ku sanglac, balakiay tu aayaman nikuda nu tangah micidek ku sanglac, sisa pangangan hantu " atipal" pangagnang Pycnonotus sinensis (mitesekay a ngangan)Pycnonotus sinensis sakatusa a kasasidumaan Pycnonotus sinensis hainanus (Swinhoe 1897).śĶ∑Śćó šļěÁ®ģ (mitesakay a ngangan)Pycnonotus sinensis hainanus (Swinhoe 1897) Hai-nan (liang-guang) sakatusa a kasasidumaan Pycnonotus sinensis formosae (Hartert, 1910) (mitesekay a ngangan)Pycnonotus sinensis formosae (Hartert, 1910) peŐćh-th√Ęu-khok-√° (kamu nu layak)peŐćh-th√Ęu-khok-√° ťĶĮŚĪ¨ŚįŹŚěčť≥īÁ¶Ĺ (mikeliday nu ngangan)Bei adidiay a aadupan kaliwasak . i Cong-guo a Si-cuan, Yun-nan, Gui-cou, An-hui, Ciang-su, Ce-ciang, San-si, He-nan, San-dong, Ciang-si, Kuang-dong, Hu-bei, Hu-nan, Hu-cian, Kuang-si atu Hai-nan. atipal Taywan nu aidiay a kasidumaan kaliwasak han i Taywan nu niyaduan (caay pilihida ku timulan nu Taruku sia-ku atu walitimulan nu lilis nu bayu), u micidekay sakatusaay a sasiduma nu Taywan. atipal nika liwasak a maudip han itini i walian nu Ya-cup kitidaan, taamis katukuh i Cong-guo a Sen-yang, tatimul katukuh i Hai-nan-dao, Siang-gang, Taywan, amisan nu Yue-nan, atu Dipun Liu-ciu cun-dao (Ba-song-san cun-dao, Okinawa). kasienawan nu amisan a ayam mabahel tayda i timul kuni ka bahel, Taywan nu adidiay a ayawman i Taywan nu liwan a ayawman, nikaudip ninaayaw han makaala tu cacay a bataan katuku tu sabaw tu lima a mihcaan kunika udip. atipal hina adih kita i Dongya, Taywan nu habung nutipan atu wali amisan nu mililis tu bayu a kitidaan, -cungguo-ren-dalu itida i Changjiang timulan a yadahay nu kitidaan, atu siang-gang, Liuqiu subal, makankan kinaayawm , caay katalaw tu tademaw. . masakaput kunuheni amabahel i masaenalay nu kilangkilangan, buyubuyuan a kilakilangan, atu cacudadan, aidangan, hinaputah, dadan nu talakaway a telayan atu kilangan. Taywan manamuhan miadih tu atipal a ayam, cilukciluk, lu-tou-yan pulung han pangangan u "kaydihan nu maciay a tuluay nu ayaman" itini i Sanghai a atipal atu ciluciluk, -congguo-hei-dong atu -cu-jing-banjiu u " si-da-jingang", ina atipal itini i kaliwasakan nu kitidaan hina adih i macimacian.. atipal a ayaman tanayu nu udip han sabaw tu pitu katukuh tu tusa a bataan idaw ku tusa a congfen, dais han makatukuh i tukung han lumeni' malikad, pabaw nu mataan katukuh i nikudan nu tangah u sanglacay a banuh kala abuabuan nu langdaw ku kulitan. sakubad atu kikul kala lawlawan nu langdaw ku kulitan, ngaduy, takulaw sanglacay, baluwan abuan nu hese, mala caaya nu katinengan a ahebal nu baluwangan, bili han sanglacay ku kulit atu abuwan sanglacay a kulitan, malamel tu kalawlawan langdawan nu sulit, pabaw han hese abuabuan atu cukanaan abuabuan nu kulitan, idaw ku kalawlawan langdawan nu kulit a banuh nu lilisan, sisa u pabawan nu udiphan caay a katinengan kunika duu'd nu mabalatay a sulitan. . Kikul atu sakubad lumeni' nu hese idaw ku kalawlawan langdawan ku lilis nu banuh. mata hese, laway lumeniay ku kulit, kuku' u lumeniay tu a kulitan. wawa nuayam tangahan abuabuan nu hese', kulu u cukanaan a kulitan, baluwan han kalaabuan nu hese, bili atu kikul nu sasa a banuhan abuabuan salacay ku kulit. cilekay ku kanen nuheni, pa'nu atu heci, u cancanan ku makanay nuheni, tamaan a atipalan u baluwan idaw ku lumeniay ku abuabuan nu kulitan, taynaan a atipalan nu kala abuabuwan ku kulit, tamaan nu nikuda a tangahan katinengan ku pimicidek nu sanglac. matenes i buyubuyuan, ahebalay nu papahan, aidangan, kilkilngan, u heci nu sikabiay atu pa'nu ku kanen, sawni micumud i bawbi nipalumaan tu hecian miubi mukan, mukan tu mangaduay a papahan, micidek tu mangaduay nu Hudie-lan amukanen, alahican u cilekay ku kanen. Pasabaan nu sadingsing palaludan malingatu asidibu, atipal malingatu asidibu sa kanca mapulung kunuheni i kilakilangan mudadiw, mangalay pakatineng tu tademaw.nika saupuan nina ayaman, katukuhan tu palalutan balngbangan kasienawan sa maliwasak tu kunu heni. atipal manamuh i siciciwan atu titican asidibu, imacian han imabadiay nu lutukan atu luciklucikan sidibu mahida u kaysing u wayway iluma han itida inipalumaan i kabing nu balu atu kilang, tu mihcaan nu sadingsing nu tuluay a bulad katukuh tu lima a buladan atipal han kabuwahan nuheni itawya. nikahida, anu makaadih kita tunika sacacaysa i ciitciitan atu kilakilanga mudadiw, caay katenes, idaw tu ku caay tayni pacabay, tusa tu ku ayam pakunida satu mudadiw, mahida mudadiway tu saka namuhan a cabayan a dadiwan. nika sidibuan nuheni sa kanca patiden kunuheni tu luman tu nuhen, adidi ku kitidaan , sidibusa kunuheni miki talakaw tu lala atudi' nu damuddamudan atu macebetay nu langawan, wina, wama a ayaman mapulun midiput kunuheni tu wawa, nu cacaya a puu'an kina cacay kinatusa asidi'kuk, nu cacaya a dibuan tulu, sepat ku ti'kuk, kasi ti'kukan nuheni u cilekay ku kanen nuhenin. matiti' tu ayam sa amakaala tu cacay a bataan katukuh tu tusa a lalipayan kunipi titi' tu ti'kuk kiya matiti' tahekal ku wawa, sa makaala tu cacay a bataan katuku tu tusa, tulu alalipayan a pakan, sa kapah tu tahekal mubahel. micapi tu lalumaan idaw ku cacayay a ayaman masasengi ku nuheni mahida u lalumaan, u "u kalutipal", u tukun acacay ku lumeniay, dumasatu malecad nami atu atipal, nu Taywan picidekan nu ayaman, itini sa i Tay-tung, Kalingku atu Heng-cun-ban-dao. namakayniay a nasulitan
S.PHON: atipar~…ĺ (kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam:***) sakanamuńßan a t…ôŇčir~…ĺan ku suni nu atipar~…ĺ. nikudan nu taŇčir~…ĺa Ē~ ° idaw ku saŇčr~…ĺa ¶aj a kur~…ĺita, nina masur~…ĺitaj atu saŇčr~…ĺa ¶aj a kur~…ĺit a r~…ĺum…ôni Ē~ °, mar~…ĺa saŇčr~…ĺa ¶aj nu r~…ĺar~…ĺi…ôr~…ĺan. saŇčr~…ĺa ¶aj a taŇčańß katin…ôŇčan ku saŇčr~…ĺa ¶, bar~…ĺakiaj tu aajaman nikuda nu taŇčańß mi ¶id…ôk ku saŇčr~…ĺa ¶, sisa paŇčaŇčan ńßantu " atipar~…ĺ" paŇčagnaŇč pj ¶nonotus sin…ônsis (mit…ôs…ôkaj a ŇčaŇčan)pj ¶nonotus sin…ônsis sakatusa a kasasidumaan pj ¶nonotus sin…ônsis ńßainanus (swinńßo…ô ****).** ** (mit…ôsakaj a ŇčaŇčan)pj ¶nonotus sin…ônsis ńßainanus (swinńßo…ô ****) ńßai-nan (r~…ĺiaŇč-guaŇč) sakatusa a kasasidumaan pj ¶nonotus sin…ônsis formosa…ô (ńßart…ôrt, ****) (mit…ôs…ôkaj a ŇčaŇčan)pj ¶nonotus sin…ônsis formosa…ô (ńßart…ôrt, ****) p…ô*ńß-tńß*u-kńßok-* (kamu nu r~…ĺajak)p…ô*ńß-tńß*u-kńßok-* ****** (mik…ôr~…ĺidaj nu ŇčaŇčan)b…ôi adidiaj a aadupan kar~…ĺiwasak . i ¶oŇč-guo a si- ¶uan, jun-nan, gui- ¶ou, an-ńßui, ¶iaŇč-su, ¶…ô- ¶iaŇč, san-si, ńß…ô-nan, san-doŇč, ¶iaŇč-si, kuaŇč-doŇč, ńßu-b…ôi, ńßu-nan, ńßu- ¶ian, kuaŇč-si atu ńßai-nan. atipar~…ĺ tajwan nu aidiaj a kasidumaan kar~…ĺiwasak ńßan i tajwan nu nijaduan ( ¶aaj pir~…ĺińßida ku timur~…ĺan nu taruku sia-ku atu war~…ĺitimur~…ĺan nu r~…ĺir~…ĺis nu baju), u mi ¶id…ôkaj sakatusaaj a sasiduma nu tajwan. atipar~…ĺ nika r~…ĺiwasak a maudip ńßan itini i war~…ĺian nu ja- ¶up kitidaan, taamis katukuńß i ¶oŇč-guo a s…ôn-jaŇč, tatimur~…ĺ katukuńß i ńßai-nan-dao, siaŇč-gaŇč, tajwan, amisan nu ju…ô-nan, atu dipun r~…ĺiu- ¶iu ¶un-dao (ba-soŇč-san ¶un-dao, okinawa). kasi…ônawan nu amisan a ajam mabańß…ôr~…ĺ tajda i timur~…ĺ kuni ka bańß…ôr~…ĺ, tajwan nu adidiaj a ajawman i tajwan nu r~…ĺiwan a ajawman, nikaudip ninaajaw ńßan makaar~…ĺa tu ¶a ¶aj a bataan katuku tu sabaw tu r~…ĺima a mińß ¶aan kunika udip. atipar~…ĺ ńßina adińß kita i doŇčja, tajwan nu ńßabuŇč nutipan atu war~…ĺi amisan nu mir~…ĺir~…ĺis tu baju a kitidaan, - ¶uŇčguo-r…ôn-dar~…ĺu itida i ¶ńßaŇčjiaŇč timur~…ĺan a jadańßaj nu kitidaan, atu siaŇč-gaŇč, r~…ĺiu*iu subar~…ĺ, makankan kinaajawm , ¶aaj katar~…ĺaw tu tad…ômaw. . masakaput kunuńß…ôni amabańß…ôr~…ĺ i masa…ônar~…ĺaj nu kir~…ĺaŇčkir~…ĺaŇčan, bujubujuan a kir~…ĺakir~…ĺaŇčan, atu ¶a ¶udadan, aidaŇčan, ńßinaputańß, dadan nu tar~…ĺakawaj a t…ôr~…ĺajan atu kir~…ĺaŇčan. tajwan manamuńßan miadińß tu atipar~…ĺ a ajam, ¶ir~…ĺuk ¶ir~…ĺuk, r~…ĺu-tou-jan pur~…ĺuŇč ńßan paŇčaŇčan u "kajdińßan nu ma ¶iaj a tur~…ĺuaj nu ajaman" itini i saŇčńßai a atipar~…ĺ atu ¶ir~…ĺu ¶ir~…ĺuk, - ¶oŇčguo-ńß…ôi-doŇč atu - ¶u-jiŇč-banjiu u " si-da-jiŇčaŇč", ina atipar~…ĺ itini i kar~…ĺiwasakan nu kitidaan ńßina adińß i ma ¶ima ¶ian.. atipar~…ĺ a ajaman tanaju nu udip ńßan sabaw tu pitu katukuńß tu tusa a bataan idaw ku tusa a ¶oŇčf…ôn, dais ńßan makatukuńß i tukuŇč ńßan r~…ĺum…ôni Ē~ ° mar~…ĺikad, pabaw nu mataan katukuńß i nikudan nu taŇčańß u saŇčr~…ĺa ¶aj a banuńß kar~…ĺa abuabuan nu r~…ĺaŇčdaw ku kur~…ĺitan. sakubad atu kikur~…ĺ kar~…ĺa r~…ĺawr~…ĺawan nu r~…ĺaŇčdaw ku kur~…ĺitan, Ňčaduj, takur~…ĺaw saŇčr~…ĺa ¶aj, bar~…ĺuwan abuan nu ńß…ôs…ô, mar~…ĺa ¶aaja nu katin…ôŇčan a ańß…ôbar~…ĺ nu bar~…ĺuwaŇčan, bir~…ĺi ńßan saŇčr~…ĺa ¶aj ku kur~…ĺit atu abuwan saŇčr~…ĺa ¶aj a kur~…ĺitan, mar~…ĺam…ôr~…ĺ tu kar~…ĺawr~…ĺawan r~…ĺaŇčdawan nu sur~…ĺit, pabaw ńßan ńß…ôs…ô abuabuan atu ¶ukanaan abuabuan nu kur~…ĺitan, idaw ku kar~…ĺawr~…ĺawan r~…ĺaŇčdawan nu kur~…ĺit a banuńß nu r~…ĺir~…ĺisan, sisa u pabawan nu udipńßan ¶aaj a katin…ôŇčan kunika duu Ē~ °d nu mabar~…ĺataj a sur~…ĺitan. . kikur~…ĺ atu sakubad r~…ĺum…ôni Ē~ ° nu ńß…ôs…ô idaw ku kar~…ĺawr~…ĺawan r~…ĺaŇčdawan ku r~…ĺir~…ĺis nu banuńß. mata ńß…ôs…ô, r~…ĺawaj r~…ĺum…ôniaj ku kur~…ĺit, kuku Ē~ ° u r~…ĺum…ôniaj tu a kur~…ĺitan. wawa nuajam taŇčańßan abuabuan nu ńß…ôs…ô Ē~ °, kur~…ĺu u ¶ukanaan a kur~…ĺitan, bar~…ĺuwan ńßan kar~…ĺaabuan nu ńß…ôs…ô, bir~…ĺi atu kikur~…ĺ nu sasa a banuńßan abuabuan sar~…ĺa ¶aj ku kur~…ĺit. ¶ir~…ĺ…ôkaj ku kan…ôn nuńß…ôni, pa Ē~ °nu atu ńß…ô ¶i, u ¶an ¶anan ku makanaj nuńß…ôni, tamaan a atipar~…ĺan u bar~…ĺuwan idaw ku r~…ĺum…ôniaj ku abuabuan nu kur~…ĺitan, tajnaan a atipar~…ĺan nu kar~…ĺa abuabuwan ku kur~…ĺit, tamaan nu nikuda a taŇčańßan katin…ôŇčan ku pimi ¶id…ôk nu saŇčr~…ĺa ¶. mat…ôn…ôs i bujubujuan, ańß…ôbar~…ĺaj nu papańßan, aidaŇčan, kir~…ĺkir~…ĺŇčan, u ńß…ô ¶i nu sikabiaj atu pa Ē~ °nu ku kan…ôn, sawni mi ¶umud i bawbi nipar~…ĺumaan tu ńß…ô ¶ian miubi mukan, mukan tu maŇčaduaj a papańßan, mi ¶id…ôk tu maŇčaduaj nu ńßudi…ô-r~…ĺan amukan…ôn, ar~…ĺańßi ¶an u ¶ir~…ĺ…ôkaj ku kan…ôn. pasabaan nu sadiŇčsiŇč par~…ĺar~…ĺudan mar~…ĺiŇčatu asidibu, atipar~…ĺ mar~…ĺiŇčatu asidibu sa kan ¶a mapur~…ĺuŇč kunuńß…ôni i kir~…ĺakir~…ĺaŇčan mudadiw, maŇčar~…ĺaj pakatin…ôŇč tu tad…ômaw.nika saupuan nina ajaman, katukuńßan tu par~…ĺar~…ĺutan bar~…ĺŇčbaŇčan kasi…ônawan sa mar~…ĺiwasak tu kunu ńß…ôni. atipar~…ĺ manamuńß i si ¶i ¶iwan atu titi ¶an asidibu, ima ¶ian ńßan imabadiaj nu r~…ĺutukan atu r~…ĺu ¶ikr~…ĺu ¶ikan sidibu mańßida u kajsiŇč u wajwaj ir~…ĺuma ńßan itida inipar~…ĺumaan i kabiŇč nu bar~…ĺu atu kir~…ĺaŇč, tu mińß ¶aan nu sadiŇčsiŇč nu tur~…ĺuaj a bur~…ĺad katukuńß tu r~…ĺima a bur~…ĺadan atipar~…ĺ ńßan kabuwańßan nuńß…ôni itawja. nikańßida, anu makaadińß kita tunika sa ¶a ¶ajsa i ¶iit ¶iitan atu kir~…ĺakir~…ĺaŇča mudadiw, ¶aaj kat…ôn…ôs, idaw tu ku ¶aaj tajni pa ¶abaj, tusa tu ku ajam pakunida satu mudadiw, mańßida mudadiwaj tu saka namuńßan a ¶abajan a dadiwan. nika sidibuan nuńß…ôni sa kan ¶a patid…ôn kunuńß…ôni tu r~…ĺuman tu nuńß…ôn, adidi ku kitidaan , sidibusa kunuńß…ôni miki tar~…ĺakaw tu r~…ĺar~…ĺa atudi Ē~ ° nu damuddamudan atu ma ¶…ôb…ôtaj nu r~…ĺaŇčawan, wina, wama a ajaman mapur~…ĺun midiput kunuńß…ôni tu wawa, nu ¶a ¶aja a puu Ē~ °an kina ¶a ¶aj kinatusa asidi Ē~ °kuk, nu ¶a ¶aja a dibuan tur~…ĺu, s…ôpat ku ti Ē~ °kuk, kasi ti Ē~ °kukan nuńß…ôni u ¶ir~…ĺ…ôkaj ku kan…ôn nuńß…ônin. matiti Ē~ ° tu ajam sa amakaar~…ĺa tu ¶a ¶aj a bataan katukuńß tu tusa a r~…ĺar~…ĺipajan kunipi titi Ē~ ° tu ti Ē~ °kuk kija matiti Ē~ ° tańß…ôkar~…ĺ ku wawa, sa makaar~…ĺa tu ¶a ¶aj a bataan katuku tu tusa, tur~…ĺu ar~…ĺar~…ĺipajan a pakan, sa kapańß tu tańß…ôkar~…ĺ mubańß…ôr~…ĺ. mi ¶api tu r~…ĺar~…ĺumaan idaw ku ¶a ¶ajaj a ajaman masas…ôŇči ku nuńß…ôni mańßida u r~…ĺar~…ĺumaan, u "u kar~…ĺutipar~…ĺ", u tukun a ¶a ¶aj ku r~…ĺum…ôniaj, dumasatu mar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad nami atu atipar~…ĺ, nu tajwan pi ¶id…ôkan nu ajaman, itini sa i taj-tuŇč, kar~…ĺiŇčku atu ńß…ôŇč- ¶un-ban-dao. namakajniaj a nasur~…ĺitan
S.FORM: atipal (kamu nu Hulam:ÁôĹť†≠ÁŅĀ) sakanamuhan a tengilan ku suni nu atipal. nikudan nu tangila' idaw ku sanglacay a kulita, nina masulitay atu sanglacay a kulit a lumeni', mala sanglacay nu lalielan. sanglacay a tangah katinengan ku sanglac, balakiay tu aayaman nikuda nu tangah micidek ku sanglac, sisa pangangan hantu " atipal" pangagnang Pycnonotus sinensis (mitesekay a ngangan)Pycnonotus sinensis sakatusa a kasasidumaan Pycnonotus sinensis hainanus (Swinhoe 1897).śĶ∑Śćó šļěÁ®ģ (mitesakay a ngangan)Pycnonotus sinensis hainanus (Swinhoe 1897) Hai-nan (liang-guang) sakatusa a kasasidumaan Pycnonotus sinensis formosae (Hartert, 1910) (mitesekay a ngangan)Pycnonotus sinensis formosae (Hartert, 1910) peŐćh-th√Ęu-khok-√° (kamu nu layak)peŐćh-th√Ęu-khok-√° ťĶĮŚĪ¨ŚįŹŚěčť≥īÁ¶Ĺ (mikeliday nu ngangan)Bei adidiay a aadupan kaliwasak . i Cong-guo a Si-cuan, Yun-nan, Gui-cou, An-hui, Ciang-su, Ce-ciang, San-si, He-nan, San-dong, Ciang-si, Kuang-dong, Hu-bei, Hu-nan, Hu-cian, Kuang-si atu Hai-nan. atipal Taywan nu aidiay a kasidumaan kaliwasak han i Taywan nu niyaduan (caay pilihida ku timulan nu Taruku sia-ku atu walitimulan nu lilis nu bayu), u micidekay sakatusaay a sasiduma nu Taywan. atipal nika liwasak a maudip han itini i walian nu Ya-cup kitidaan, taamis katukuh i Cong-guo a Sen-yang, tatimul katukuh i Hai-nan-dao, Siang-gang, Taywan, amisan nu Yue-nan, atu Dipun Liu-ciu cun-dao (Ba-song-san cun-dao, Okinawa). kasienawan nu amisan a ayam mabahel tayda i timul kuni ka bahel, Taywan nu adidiay a ayawman i Taywan nu liwan a ayawman, nikaudip ninaayaw han makaala tu cacay a bataan katuku tu sabaw tu lima a mihcaan kunika udip. atipal hina adih kita i Dongya, Taywan nu habung nutipan atu wali amisan nu mililis tu bayu a kitidaan, -cungguo-ren-dalu itida i Changjiang timulan a yadahay nu kitidaan, atu siang-gang, Liuqiu subal, makankan kinaayawm , caay katalaw tu tademaw. . masakaput kunuheni amabahel i masaenalay nu kilangkilangan, buyubuyuan a kilakilangan, atu cacudadan, aidangan, hinaputah, dadan nu talakaway a telayan atu kilangan. Taywan manamuhan miadih tu atipal a ayam, cilukciluk, lu-tou-yan pulung han pangangan u "kaydihan nu maciay a tuluay nu ayaman" itini i Sanghai a atipal atu ciluciluk, -congguo-hei-dong atu -cu-jing-banjiu u " si-da-jingang", ina atipal itini i kaliwasakan nu kitidaan hina adih i macimacian.. atipal a ayaman tanayu nu udip han sabaw tu pitu katukuh tu tusa a bataan idaw ku tusa a congfen, dais han makatukuh i tukung han lumeni' malikad, pabaw nu mataan katukuh i nikudan nu tangah u sanglacay a banuh kala abuabuan nu langdaw ku kulitan. sakubad atu kikul kala lawlawan nu langdaw ku kulitan, ngaduy, takulaw sanglacay, baluwan abuan nu hese, mala caaya nu katinengan a ahebal nu baluwangan, bili han sanglacay ku kulit atu abuwan sanglacay a kulitan, malamel tu kalawlawan langdawan nu sulit, pabaw han hese abuabuan atu cukanaan abuabuan nu kulitan, idaw ku kalawlawan langdawan nu kulit a banuh nu lilisan, sisa u pabawan nu udiphan caay a katinengan kunika duu'd nu mabalatay a sulitan. . Kikul atu sakubad lumeni' nu hese idaw ku kalawlawan langdawan ku lilis nu banuh. mata hese, laway lumeniay ku kulit, kuku' u lumeniay tu a kulitan. wawa nuayam tangahan abuabuan nu hese', kulu u cukanaan a kulitan, baluwan han kalaabuan nu hese, bili atu kikul nu sasa a banuhan abuabuan salacay ku kulit. cilekay ku kanen nuheni, pa'nu atu heci, u cancanan ku makanay nuheni, tamaan a atipalan u baluwan idaw ku lumeniay ku abuabuan nu kulitan, taynaan a atipalan nu kala abuabuwan ku kulit, tamaan nu nikuda a tangahan katinengan ku pimicidek nu sanglac. matenes i buyubuyuan, ahebalay nu papahan, aidangan, kilkilngan, u heci nu sikabiay atu pa'nu ku kanen, sawni micumud i bawbi nipalumaan tu hecian miubi mukan, mukan tu mangaduay a papahan, micidek tu mangaduay nu Hudie-lan amukanen, alahican u cilekay ku kanen. Pasabaan nu sadingsing palaludan malingatu asidibu, atipal malingatu asidibu sa kanca mapulung kunuheni i kilakilangan mudadiw, mangalay pakatineng tu tademaw.nika saupuan nina ayaman, katukuhan tu palalutan balngbangan kasienawan sa maliwasak tu kunu heni. atipal manamuh i siciciwan atu titican asidibu, imacian han imabadiay nu lutukan atu luciklucikan sidibu mahida u kaysing u wayway iluma han itida inipalumaan i kabing nu balu atu kilang, tu mihcaan nu sadingsing nu tuluay a bulad katukuh tu lima a buladan atipal han kabuwahan nuheni itawya. nikahida, anu makaadih kita tunika sacacaysa i ciitciitan atu kilakilanga mudadiw, caay katenes, idaw tu ku caay tayni pacabay, tusa tu ku ayam pakunida satu mudadiw, mahida mudadiway tu saka namuhan a cabayan a dadiwan. nika sidibuan nuheni sa kanca patiden kunuheni tu luman tu nuhen, adidi ku kitidaan , sidibusa kunuheni miki talakaw tu lala atudi' nu damuddamudan atu macebetay nu langawan, wina, wama a ayaman mapulun midiput kunuheni tu wawa, nu cacaya a puu'an kina cacay kinatusa asidi'kuk, nu cacaya a dibuan tulu, sepat ku ti'kuk, kasi ti'kukan nuheni u cilekay ku kanen nuhenin. matiti' tu ayam sa amakaala tu cacay a bataan katukuh tu tusa a lalipayan kunipi titi' tu ti'kuk kiya matiti' tahekal ku wawa, sa makaala tu cacay a bataan katuku tu tusa, tulu alalipayan a pakan, sa kapah tu tahekal mubahel. micapi tu lalumaan idaw ku cacayay a ayaman masasengi ku nuheni mahida u lalumaan, u "u kalutipal", u tukun acacay ku lumeniay, dumasatu malecad nami atu atipal, nu Taywan picidekan nu ayaman, itini sa i Tay-tung, Kalingku atu Heng-cun-ban-dao. namakayniay a nasulitan
S.PHON: atipar~…ĺ (kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam:***) sakanamuńßan a t…ôŇčir~…ĺan ku suni nu atipar~…ĺ. nikudan nu taŇčir~…ĺa Ē~ ° idaw ku saŇčr~…ĺa ¶aj a kur~…ĺita, nina masur~…ĺitaj atu saŇčr~…ĺa ¶aj a kur~…ĺit a r~…ĺum…ôni Ē~ °, mar~…ĺa saŇčr~…ĺa ¶aj nu r~…ĺar~…ĺi…ôr~…ĺan. saŇčr~…ĺa ¶aj a taŇčańß katin…ôŇčan ku saŇčr~…ĺa ¶, bar~…ĺakiaj tu aajaman nikuda nu taŇčańß mi ¶id…ôk ku saŇčr~…ĺa ¶, sisa paŇčaŇčan ńßantu " atipar~…ĺ" paŇčagnaŇč pj ¶nonotus sin…ônsis (mit…ôs…ôkaj a ŇčaŇčan)pj ¶nonotus sin…ônsis sakatusa a kasasidumaan pj ¶nonotus sin…ônsis ńßainanus (swinńßo…ô ****).** ** (mit…ôsakaj a ŇčaŇčan)pj ¶nonotus sin…ônsis ńßainanus (swinńßo…ô ****) ńßai-nan (r~…ĺiaŇč-guaŇč) sakatusa a kasasidumaan pj ¶nonotus sin…ônsis formosa…ô (ńßart…ôrt, ****) (mit…ôs…ôkaj a ŇčaŇčan)pj ¶nonotus sin…ônsis formosa…ô (ńßart…ôrt, ****) p…ô*ńß-tńß*u-kńßok-* (kamu nu r~…ĺajak)p…ô*ńß-tńß*u-kńßok-* ****** (mik…ôr~…ĺidaj nu ŇčaŇčan)b…ôi adidiaj a aadupan kar~…ĺiwasak . i ¶oŇč-guo a si- ¶uan, jun-nan, gui- ¶ou, an-ńßui, ¶iaŇč-su, ¶…ô- ¶iaŇč, san-si, ńß…ô-nan, san-doŇč, ¶iaŇč-si, kuaŇč-doŇč, ńßu-b…ôi, ńßu-nan, ńßu- ¶ian, kuaŇč-si atu ńßai-nan. atipar~…ĺ tajwan nu aidiaj a kasidumaan kar~…ĺiwasak ńßan i tajwan nu nijaduan ( ¶aaj pir~…ĺińßida ku timur~…ĺan nu taruku sia-ku atu war~…ĺitimur~…ĺan nu r~…ĺir~…ĺis nu baju), u mi ¶id…ôkaj sakatusaaj a sasiduma nu tajwan. atipar~…ĺ nika r~…ĺiwasak a maudip ńßan itini i war~…ĺian nu ja- ¶up kitidaan, taamis katukuńß i ¶oŇč-guo a s…ôn-jaŇč, tatimur~…ĺ katukuńß i ńßai-nan-dao, siaŇč-gaŇč, tajwan, amisan nu ju…ô-nan, atu dipun r~…ĺiu- ¶iu ¶un-dao (ba-soŇč-san ¶un-dao, okinawa). kasi…ônawan nu amisan a ajam mabańß…ôr~…ĺ tajda i timur~…ĺ kuni ka bańß…ôr~…ĺ, tajwan nu adidiaj a ajawman i tajwan nu r~…ĺiwan a ajawman, nikaudip ninaajaw ńßan makaar~…ĺa tu ¶a ¶aj a bataan katuku tu sabaw tu r~…ĺima a mińß ¶aan kunika udip. atipar~…ĺ ńßina adińß kita i doŇčja, tajwan nu ńßabuŇč nutipan atu war~…ĺi amisan nu mir~…ĺir~…ĺis tu baju a kitidaan, - ¶uŇčguo-r…ôn-dar~…ĺu itida i ¶ńßaŇčjiaŇč timur~…ĺan a jadańßaj nu kitidaan, atu siaŇč-gaŇč, r~…ĺiu*iu subar~…ĺ, makankan kinaajawm , ¶aaj katar~…ĺaw tu tad…ômaw. . masakaput kunuńß…ôni amabańß…ôr~…ĺ i masa…ônar~…ĺaj nu kir~…ĺaŇčkir~…ĺaŇčan, bujubujuan a kir~…ĺakir~…ĺaŇčan, atu ¶a ¶udadan, aidaŇčan, ńßinaputańß, dadan nu tar~…ĺakawaj a t…ôr~…ĺajan atu kir~…ĺaŇčan. tajwan manamuńßan miadińß tu atipar~…ĺ a ajam, ¶ir~…ĺuk ¶ir~…ĺuk, r~…ĺu-tou-jan pur~…ĺuŇč ńßan paŇčaŇčan u "kajdińßan nu ma ¶iaj a tur~…ĺuaj nu ajaman" itini i saŇčńßai a atipar~…ĺ atu ¶ir~…ĺu ¶ir~…ĺuk, - ¶oŇčguo-ńß…ôi-doŇč atu - ¶u-jiŇč-banjiu u " si-da-jiŇčaŇč", ina atipar~…ĺ itini i kar~…ĺiwasakan nu kitidaan ńßina adińß i ma ¶ima ¶ian.. atipar~…ĺ a ajaman tanaju nu udip ńßan sabaw tu pitu katukuńß tu tusa a bataan idaw ku tusa a ¶oŇčf…ôn, dais ńßan makatukuńß i tukuŇč ńßan r~…ĺum…ôni Ē~ ° mar~…ĺikad, pabaw nu mataan katukuńß i nikudan nu taŇčańß u saŇčr~…ĺa ¶aj a banuńß kar~…ĺa abuabuan nu r~…ĺaŇčdaw ku kur~…ĺitan. sakubad atu kikur~…ĺ kar~…ĺa r~…ĺawr~…ĺawan nu r~…ĺaŇčdaw ku kur~…ĺitan, Ňčaduj, takur~…ĺaw saŇčr~…ĺa ¶aj, bar~…ĺuwan abuan nu ńß…ôs…ô, mar~…ĺa ¶aaja nu katin…ôŇčan a ańß…ôbar~…ĺ nu bar~…ĺuwaŇčan, bir~…ĺi ńßan saŇčr~…ĺa ¶aj ku kur~…ĺit atu abuwan saŇčr~…ĺa ¶aj a kur~…ĺitan, mar~…ĺam…ôr~…ĺ tu kar~…ĺawr~…ĺawan r~…ĺaŇčdawan nu sur~…ĺit, pabaw ńßan ńß…ôs…ô abuabuan atu ¶ukanaan abuabuan nu kur~…ĺitan, idaw ku kar~…ĺawr~…ĺawan r~…ĺaŇčdawan nu kur~…ĺit a banuńß nu r~…ĺir~…ĺisan, sisa u pabawan nu udipńßan ¶aaj a katin…ôŇčan kunika duu Ē~ °d nu mabar~…ĺataj a sur~…ĺitan. . kikur~…ĺ atu sakubad r~…ĺum…ôni Ē~ ° nu ńß…ôs…ô idaw ku kar~…ĺawr~…ĺawan r~…ĺaŇčdawan ku r~…ĺir~…ĺis nu banuńß. mata ńß…ôs…ô, r~…ĺawaj r~…ĺum…ôniaj ku kur~…ĺit, kuku Ē~ ° u r~…ĺum…ôniaj tu a kur~…ĺitan. wawa nuajam taŇčańßan abuabuan nu ńß…ôs…ô Ē~ °, kur~…ĺu u ¶ukanaan a kur~…ĺitan, bar~…ĺuwan ńßan kar~…ĺaabuan nu ńß…ôs…ô, bir~…ĺi atu kikur~…ĺ nu sasa a banuńßan abuabuan sar~…ĺa ¶aj ku kur~…ĺit. ¶ir~…ĺ…ôkaj ku kan…ôn nuńß…ôni, pa Ē~ °nu atu ńß…ô ¶i, u ¶an ¶anan ku makanaj nuńß…ôni, tamaan a atipar~…ĺan u bar~…ĺuwan idaw ku r~…ĺum…ôniaj ku abuabuan nu kur~…ĺitan, tajnaan a atipar~…ĺan nu kar~…ĺa abuabuwan ku kur~…ĺit, tamaan nu nikuda a taŇčańßan katin…ôŇčan ku pimi ¶id…ôk nu saŇčr~…ĺa ¶. mat…ôn…ôs i bujubujuan, ańß…ôbar~…ĺaj nu papańßan, aidaŇčan, kir~…ĺkir~…ĺŇčan, u ńß…ô ¶i nu sikabiaj atu pa Ē~ °nu ku kan…ôn, sawni mi ¶umud i bawbi nipar~…ĺumaan tu ńß…ô ¶ian miubi mukan, mukan tu maŇčaduaj a papańßan, mi ¶id…ôk tu maŇčaduaj nu ńßudi…ô-r~…ĺan amukan…ôn, ar~…ĺańßi ¶an u ¶ir~…ĺ…ôkaj ku kan…ôn. pasabaan nu sadiŇčsiŇč par~…ĺar~…ĺudan mar~…ĺiŇčatu asidibu, atipar~…ĺ mar~…ĺiŇčatu asidibu sa kan ¶a mapur~…ĺuŇč kunuńß…ôni i kir~…ĺakir~…ĺaŇčan mudadiw, maŇčar~…ĺaj pakatin…ôŇč tu tad…ômaw.nika saupuan nina ajaman, katukuńßan tu par~…ĺar~…ĺutan bar~…ĺŇčbaŇčan kasi…ônawan sa mar~…ĺiwasak tu kunu ńß…ôni. atipar~…ĺ manamuńß i si ¶i ¶iwan atu titi ¶an asidibu, ima ¶ian ńßan imabadiaj nu r~…ĺutukan atu r~…ĺu ¶ikr~…ĺu ¶ikan sidibu mańßida u kajsiŇč u wajwaj ir~…ĺuma ńßan itida inipar~…ĺumaan i kabiŇč nu bar~…ĺu atu kir~…ĺaŇč, tu mińß ¶aan nu sadiŇčsiŇč nu tur~…ĺuaj a bur~…ĺad katukuńß tu r~…ĺima a bur~…ĺadan atipar~…ĺ ńßan kabuwańßan nuńß…ôni itawja. nikańßida, anu makaadińß kita tunika sa ¶a ¶ajsa i ¶iit ¶iitan atu kir~…ĺakir~…ĺaŇča mudadiw, ¶aaj kat…ôn…ôs, idaw tu ku ¶aaj tajni pa ¶abaj, tusa tu ku ajam pakunida satu mudadiw, mańßida mudadiwaj tu saka namuńßan a ¶abajan a dadiwan. nika sidibuan nuńß…ôni sa kan ¶a patid…ôn kunuńß…ôni tu r~…ĺuman tu nuńß…ôn, adidi ku kitidaan , sidibusa kunuńß…ôni miki tar~…ĺakaw tu r~…ĺar~…ĺa atudi Ē~ ° nu damuddamudan atu ma ¶…ôb…ôtaj nu r~…ĺaŇčawan, wina, wama a ajaman mapur~…ĺun midiput kunuńß…ôni tu wawa, nu ¶a ¶aja a puu Ē~ °an kina ¶a ¶aj kinatusa asidi Ē~ °kuk, nu ¶a ¶aja a dibuan tur~…ĺu, s…ôpat ku ti Ē~ °kuk, kasi ti Ē~ °kukan nuńß…ôni u ¶ir~…ĺ…ôkaj ku kan…ôn nuńß…ônin. matiti Ē~ ° tu ajam sa amakaar~…ĺa tu ¶a ¶aj a bataan katukuńß tu tusa a r~…ĺar~…ĺipajan kunipi titi Ē~ ° tu ti Ē~ °kuk kija matiti Ē~ ° tańß…ôkar~…ĺ ku wawa, sa makaar~…ĺa tu ¶a ¶aj a bataan katuku tu tusa, tur~…ĺu ar~…ĺar~…ĺipajan a pakan, sa kapańß tu tańß…ôkar~…ĺ mubańß…ôr~…ĺ. mi ¶api tu r~…ĺar~…ĺumaan idaw ku ¶a ¶ajaj a ajaman masas…ôŇči ku nuńß…ôni mańßida u r~…ĺar~…ĺumaan, u "u kar~…ĺutipar~…ĺ", u tukun a ¶a ¶aj ku r~…ĺum…ôniaj, dumasatu mar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad nami atu atipar~…ĺ, nu tajwan pi ¶id…ôkan nu ajaman, itini sa i taj-tuŇč, kar~…ĺiŇčku atu ńß…ôŇč- ¶un-ban-dao. namakajniaj a nasur~…ĺitan
